src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/OciHe.general_idea: Define a custom ThreadPoolTaskScheduler bean to manage scheduled tasks with a specific thread pool size.

src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/bean/.general_idea: Add a boolean flag to track if the instance shape is unavailable.
Add a boolean flag to track if too many requests were made.
Change the type of the creation counter from int to long to support larger values.
Rename the field from leftCreateNumbers to createNumbers to reflect total count rather than remaining.
Explicitly initialize isSuccess to false for clarity.
Add volatile keyword to a shared mutable integer field to ensure visibility across threads in a multi-threaded environment.
Add a tenantName field to the OciUser entity to store the tenant name.

Add new DTO and parameter classes for configuration and security rules.
Add new response class for OCI configuration details.

Refactor VCN and Subnet creation logic to handle existing resources and availability domains more robustly.
Inline waiter creation for instance creation instead of using a pre-initialized field.
Refine error handling to distinguish between capacity issues, limit exceeded, and rate limiting (429).
Add methods to list regions and region subscriptions.
Add methods to manage MFA devices and API keys (delete all).

src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/confi.general_idea: Added synchronized keyword to methods modifying shared network resources to prevent race conditions.
Updated resource display names from generic 'java-sdk-example' to project-specific 'oci-helper' prefixes.
Removed complex pre-check logic for subnet existence, simplifying the createSubnet method to always attempt creation.

src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/confi.general_idea: Enhanced error logging in deleteSubnet to include the exception object for better debugging.
Disabled instance monitoring by default in launch details to reduce overhead or cost.
Changed instance naming convention from timestamp-based to formatted datetime string.
Removed the terminateInstance method as it is no longer used or handled elsewhere.
Changed boot volume and launch details methods from static to public instance methods.
Added try-catch block to findRootCompartment to fallback to tenantId if compartment lookup fails.
Added early return check for empty public IP list to prevent unnecessary processing.
Replaced null check with utility method for robust string validation of public IP address.
Reformatted builder patterns and method calls to improve code readability and consistency.
Refactor public IP replacement logic to ensure resource cleanup in finally block and return null on failure instead of throwing.
src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/confi.human_impl: Moved releaseUnusedPublicIps() to finally block and changed throw new RuntimeException(e) to return null.
